title: eriogonum brevicaule var. brevicaule
intro: Eriogonum brevicaule var. brevicaule, also known as short-leaf buckwheat, is a species of flowering plant in the buckwheat family. It is a shrub that grows in the dry regions of western North America, and its medicinal properties include its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Eriogonum brevicaule var. brevicaule include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its traditional use in treating digestive issues and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Eriogonum brevicaule var. brevicaule include infusions and decoctions, which can be made by steeping the dried leaves and flowers in hot water.
